# Bundled HidHide installer

Place the official HidHide Windows installer in this directory before building
the Tauri bundle.

Accepted file names:

- `HidHide*.exe`
- `HidHide*.msi`

JSM Studio only launches this installer when the user opens HidHide controls and
HidHide is not already installed. The installer is not bundled in source control
by this placeholder file.
